assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: Line 3: '## Repository Registry'. Line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'. Line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. Both repositories are listed with their correct Serena instance names.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 10-16 contain '## Jira Configuration' with all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: Line 18: '## Code Intelligence'. Line 20: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' The naming convention is explicitly documented.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: Line 22: '### Limitations' appears after '## Code Intelligence' (line 18) and before '## Bug Configuration' (line 27), correctly nested under Code Intelligence. Content: 'No limitations known for either Serena instance.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: Line 5: 'Discovered 2 Serena MCP server instances from the available MCP tool listing:'. Line 7 describes 'serena_backend' identified by tools prefixed with 'mcp__serena_backend__'. Line 9 describes 'serena_ui' identified by tools prefixed with 'mcp__serena_ui__'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 3-9 under '## Added' list all four sections as newly added: 'Repository Registry', 'Jira Configuration', 'Code Intelligence', 'Bug Configuration'. Lines 16-19 under '## Preserved' show pre-existing content was kept: 'Project title and description', 'Documentation section with links', 'Getting Started section'.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Line 5 of claude-md-result.md: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — all four required columns are present in the exact expected order.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 27-30: '## Bug Configuration' followed by 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields are present with the expected values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 19-21: '## Security Configuration' / 'User declined security triage opt-in. Security Configuration section not added.' changes-log.md lines 11-13: '## Not Added' / 'Security Configuration -- User declined the security triage opt-in; section omitted'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section — confirmed by full file read (31 lines, no such heading).
